title: Make scheduling, dependency gating, and query views integration-aware
summary: Teach scheduling and blocker resolution to distinguish completion, coordination publication, and target integration so downstream work can depend on the right state instead of plain task completion.

acceptance.label: Blockers and dependency checks can gate separately on completion, coordination publication, and verified target integration.
Query surfaces expose the distinct integration-aware lifecycle states without ad hoc interpretation in clients.
Follow-on tasks can explicitly depend on `integrated_to_target` when the target branch state matters.
